updates.note: The West Bengal Public Service Commission (WBPSC) announced that the WBCS (Exe.) Etc. Examination 2024 will be held on June 14, 2026 (Sunday) from 12:00 Noon to 2:30 PM at venues in Kolkata and 25 district centres across West Bengal. E-admit cards will be available for download from the PSC website (psc.wb.gov.in) from June 4, 2026. The scheduling of this long-pending exam is a concrete step towards filling abolished vacancies in a transparent and time-bound manner. ↗ WBPSC Official Notification | May 14, 2026
